description: Stacking ensemble: RF + XGBoost base learners; Logistic Regression meta-learner
rationale: Stacking leverages complementary model strengths — RF robustness + XGB boosting. LR meta-learner calibrates the ensemble's probability outputs.

reviewer_context.hint: Previous approach underperformed. Next strategy should use a fundamentally different feature representation (e.g., PCA, pathway scores, ensemble stacking) rather than incremental changes.
